category_sources: source_facts.description says codec for DV video encoding format; official libdv homepage describes Quasar DV Codec as software codec for DV video.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libdv; official homepage heading is Quasar DV Codec: libdv.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section and is the best official documentation surface, though it notes documentation is limited.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge homepage and downloads were found, but no distinct official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables dubdv/dvconnect/encodedv; official homepage describes DV video, IEEE 1394/FireWire context, decoder, encoder, and sample applications.
